items.title: BIW Allowance Cut, Expensive Flight Tickets Complicating Travel To Peninsula — Medical Officer
items.summary: The BIW allowance reduction to RM360, coupled with an automatic BISH allowance cut, leaves us with just extra RM60 compared to our friends working in Semenanjung. I can't visit my baby back home because of expensive flight tickets amid the Iran war. The post BIW Allowance Cut, Expensive Flight Tickets Complicating Travel To Peninsula — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Can’t Compare Complex Health Care To Airline Pricing — Dr Poh Ban Chung
items.summary: Comparing inherently complex health care to airline pricing doesn't quite fit. The suggestion that health care costs should be as predictable as a flight ticket assumes that the journey is already defined. In reality, health care is a process of discovery. The post Can’t Compare Complex Health Care To Airline Pricing — Dr Poh Ban Chung appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Making Payment To Staff’s Personal Accounts Not Uncommon In MOH, Say Doctors
items.summary: At least two govt doctors say they usually make payments to coworkers' personal accounts for work, like courses or department activities like parties. Receipts are given for course materials. Salary overpayment occurs, like RM14k over 3 years for one MO. The post Making Payment To Staff’s Personal Accounts Not Uncommon In MOH, Say Doctors appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: 300L RON95 Quota Isn’t A Privilege, But A Necessity For Public Health Assistants — KPKASM
items.summary: Public health assistants (PKA) are among the groups most affected by the reduction of the RON95 fuel subsidy quota from 300 to 200 litres because they conduct a substantial portion of their work in the field, moving between locations to do inspections. The post 300L RON95 Quota Isn’t A Privilege, But A Necessity For Public Health Assistants — KPKASM appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Admin Error Goes Unpunished, Doctors Suffer The Consequences — Medical Officer
items.summary: HTA housemen succumbed to their PT because they know that fighting their admin is useless. The PT's alleged con was based on legit cases of salary overpayment that occurred elsewhere. Why should health care staff pay the consequences of admin incompetence? The post Admin Error Goes Unpunished, Doctors Suffer The Consequences — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysia Part Of New Asean Fertiliser Alliance For Food Security
items.summary: Indonesia, Malaysia, and Brunei have formed a new Southeast Asia Fertiliser Association (Seafa) to boost food security, with Indonesia serving as the inaugural chairman and Malaysia (represented by Petronas Chemicals Group Berhad) as co-chairman. The post Malaysia Part Of New Asean Fertiliser Alliance For Food Security appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Probe Denial Of Overtime Allowance For Paramedics, Ambulance Drivers: Ex-Senator
items.summary: Ex-senator Dr RA Lingeshwaran asks why paramedics and ambulance drivers are denied payment of overtime allowance or replacement leave, even though MOH says support staff are eligible for these entitlements if they're instructed "in writing" to be on-call. The post Probe Denial Of Overtime Allowance For Paramedics, Ambulance Drivers: Ex-Senator appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Smartphone Apps Are Changing How We Study Everyday Brain Activity
items.summary: Natural EEGs can support long-term monitoring outside hospitals for people with neurological disorders, and help others track health issues such as fatigue, workload stress, or flagging attention during routine activities. The post Smartphone Apps Are Changing How We Study Everyday Brain Activity appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: No Extension For Contract Pharmacists, Applications Open End 2027: MOH
items.summary: MOH says there are no contract extensions for over 40 pharmacists who lost their jobs last Saturday because they reached their max 5-year contract duration. They may reapply in more than one and a half year's time when permanent recruitment opens end 2027. The post No Extension For Contract Pharmacists, Applications Open End 2027: MOH appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: When The System Fails Young Doctors: Lessons From HTA Housemen Scam — Clinician
items.summary: It sounds like common sense not to transfer money to a personal account for official payments. But this is a profound misunderstanding of what it's like to be a houseman in Malaysia, where questioning instructions is seen as defiance. "Just follow first". The post When The System Fails Young Doctors: Lessons From HTA Housemen Scam — Clinician appeared first on CodeBlue .
